content: Cows are fed diets that allow them to produce more milk, very unnatural things.
Cows are fed a lot of synthetic hormones that encourage them to produce a lot more milk.
Women that are breastfeeding, there's all this evidence out there that says that what that woman eats is going to trickle down into the child.
Cows are consuming a lot in the way of antibiotics, they're consuming a lot in the way of synthetic hormones, and it's all trickling down to us.
Excess antibiotics coming into your body, you are consistently damaging the healthy flora within your intestinal lining and within your stomach.
Insulin growth factor that they are pumping these cows full of to help them produce more milk, is directly linked to breast cancer and to prostate cancer.
Lactase, is the enzyme that breaks down lactose, which is sugar in milk.
We’re designed to break down lactose, but only until we’re about two to five-years-old.
Whey protein, which you’re probably familiar with in all the grocery stores and all the protein powders; and then we’ve got casein protein, which is more of a globulin.
